choices.text: CEI pattern (Checks→Effects→Interactions) + OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard nonReentrant modifier. State updated before external call so reentrant attacker sees zeroed balance. Defense in depth.
(bool ok,) = payable(to).call{value: amount}(""); require(ok). .transfer's 2300 gas stipend broken by EIP-1884. .call forwards all available gas; check success.
Gnosis Safe multi-sig + TimelockController. Multi-sig prevents single-key rug; timelock 48-72 hours gives users exit window. Standard for Uniswap, Aave, Compound.
Bitmap: mapping(uint256 => uint256). 256 flags per slot. bitmap[id/256] |= (1 << (id%256)) to set. 256× less storage. Standard for airdrop claim tracking.

Append-only: never reorder/remove existing variables. Add at end. Use uint256[N] __gap arrays in parent contracts. OZ Upgrades plugin validates compatibility. Reordering = catastrophic data corruption.
